channel.title: True Crime Digest
channel.description: Daily true crime stories in 5 minutes. Real cases, investigations, courtroom drama, and justice served â€” every morning. The most gripping podcast on your commute.
channel.itunes:author: True Crime Digest

item.title: True News Jun 29 — Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr Teen Killer
item.description: A staggering trend is emerging in the world of true crime: teenage killers. It's a phenomenon that's leaving experts and law enforcement officials alike scrambling to understand the motivations and factors that drive these young individuals to commit such heinous acts. One such case is that of Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr, a teenager who made headlines for his shocking crime. What's particularly disturbing about Blade's case is the sheer brutality and lack of remorse shown by the young perpetrator. ...

item.title: True Crime Digest | Jun 30 — Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr Teen Killer
item.description: Imagine being just 13 years old and taking a life, a decision that will haunt you forever, and a reminder that the lines between childhood and adulthood can become disturbingly blurred. This is the reality for Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr, a teen killer who made headlines for his heinous crime. What's even more alarming is that Blade Jr is not an isolated case - there are numerous instances of teenagers committing horrific crimes, leaving us to wonder what drives them to such extremes. The story of ...

item.title: True Crime Digest | Jun 30 — Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr Teen Killer
item.description: The staggering reality of juvenile justice is that some of the most heinous crimes are committed by teenagers, leaving us to wonder what drives someone so young to commit such atrocities. Take the case of Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr, a teen killer who made headlines for his brutal crime. What's particularly disturbing about Blade's case is that it highlights the complexities of juvenile justice and the challenges of rehabilitating young offenders. The fact that someone so young can be capable of su...

item.title: True Crime Digest | Jul 01 — Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr Teen Killer
item.description: Imagine being just 13 years old and taking someone's life - it's a harsh reality that's all too common in the world of true crime. What's striking about Blade's case is the sheer violence and lack of empathy he showed, raising questions about wh...

item.title: True Crime Digest | Jul 02 — Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr Teen Killer
item.description: Imagine being just 13 years old and taking someone's life, a harsh reality that's all too common in the cases we're going to dive into today. Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr is one such teen killer who made headlines for his brutal crime. What's striking about Blade's case is the sheer lack of empathy he showed towards his victim, a trait that's become all too familiar in the world of true crime. It matters because it raises questions about the societal factors that lead to such extreme behavior in you...

item.description: Imagine being just a teenager, with your whole life ahead of you, and yet, you're capable of taking someone else's life - a disturbing trend that's been making headlines in recent years. We're talking about teen killers, and today, we're diving into the shocking stories of five individuals who committed heinous crimes at a very young age. First up, let's talk about Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr, a teen who made headlines for his brutal actions. What's particularly disturbing about Blade's case is tha...

item.description: Imagine being just a teenager, yet having a lifetime of regret and guilt weighing on your conscience, all because of a horrific crime you committed. This is the reality for Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr, a teen killer who made headlines for his heinous actions. What's even more alarming is that Akeeley's case is not an isolated incident, but rather part of a disturbing trend of teenage killers who are taking lives and leaving families shattered. Akeeley's story matters because it raises important que...

item.title: True Crime Digest | Jul 05 — Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr Teen Killer
item.description: Imagine being just a teenager, with your whole life ahead of you, but instead of worrying about prom or college applications, you're standing trial for murder. This is the disturbing reality for a growing number of teens who are committing heinous crimes, leaving communities shattered and families torn apart. One such case is that of Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr, a teen killer who made headlines for his brutal actions. What's chilling about Blade's case is the lack of remorse he showed for his crime...

item.title: Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr Teen Killer — True Crime Digest | Jul 06
item.description: A staggering four out of five teenagers who committed heinous murders this week were under the age of seventeen, with Akeeley Keshawn Blade Jr being the youngest at just fifteen years old when he took the life of his victim. This alarming trend has raised serious concerns about the state of juvenile justice and the effectiveness of rehabilitation programs for young offenders. Blade's case, in particular, has sparked a heated debate about the role of social media in influencing violent behavior a...

item.title: 'I over-killed him, right?': Man blew away roommate who — True Crime Digest | Jul 08
item.description: Eighty-two percent of people who share a living space have had a dispute with their roommate at some point, but for one man, that disagreement turned deadly when he shot and killed his roommate who had moved in and tried to dominate the house. The killer's chilling words to police, "I over-killed him, right?" are a haunting indication of the extreme measures he took to resolve the conflict. According to reports, the situation inside the home was fine until the victim started living with them, an...

item.title: Parks director accused of leaving 5-year-old in van — True Crime Digest | Jul 09
item.description: A parks director who left a 5-year-old in a van overnight has just had her case dismissed because the cop who was supposed to testify against her missed the court date. This is a stunning turn of events, and it's raising a lot of questions about how this could have happened. According to reports, the parks director, Ray, acknowledged that she didn't check the van to make sure it was empty before locking it up and going home for the night. Thankfully, the child was found safe and sound, but it's ...

item.title: Erika Kirk tries to scrub away 'conspiracy theories' and — True Crime Digest | Jul 10
item.description: Every exhibit entered into evidence during the preliminary hearing for Tyler Robinson must be visible to every person lawfully present in the courtroom, thanks to a motion filed by Erika Kirk, who's trying to scrub away conspiracy theories surrounding her son Charlie's assassination. This is a bold move, and it's clear that Erika Kirk is trying to get ahead of any speculation that might arise during the trial. By demanding transparency, she's ensuring that everyone in the courtroom has access to...

item.title: Woman who shot her boyfriend in the head and stole his dog — True Crime Digest | Jul 11
item.description: A woman who shot her boyfriend in the head and stole his dog was rambling about sugar beets while being arrested, a bizarre detail that has left investigators and the public alike trying to make sense of the heinous crime. The woman's incoherent statements, which included remarks about her boyfriend losing weight, have raised more questions than answers about her state of mind and the events leading up to the shooting. As she was taken away by police, her nonsensical comments were a stark contra...

item.title: 'Blatant disregard for federal laws': Trump admin sues — True Crime Digest | Jul 12
item.description: Nearly two decades behind bars is the sentence for a Kansas man whose reckless behavior led to the death of his 1-year-old daughter, who was shot in the head by his 3-year-old after he left his handgun within reach of the older girl. This tragic case is a stark reminder of the devastating consequences of gun owners failing to properly secure their firearms, especially when children are present. The fact that the father asked his 3-year-old daughter why she did that after the shooting is a haunti...

item.title: Man calmly shoots his mom's boyfriend dead after he started — True Crime Digest | Jul 13
item.description: Twenty-five bone fractures were inflicted on a baby by a frustrated caregiver who repeatedly squeezed the child to relieve gas. This shocking case out of Florida has left authorities stunned, and the accused is now facing serious charges. According to police, the caregiver admitted to squeezing the baby harder and harder, ultimately leading to the discovery of 25 bone fractures when the child was brought to the hospital for breathing issues. This horrific incident raises concerns about the safet...

item.title: D4VD MORGUE LEAK TORPEDOES CELESTE PROBE, CASE DROPPED? — True Crime Digest | Jul 14
item.description:
Sixteen times, that's how many times Nathaniel Gotham allegedly stabbed his wife, telling authorities he just wanted to make her stop talking, a chilling admission that has left investigators and the public reeling. This horrific crime has raised questions about the warning signs that may have been missed and the devastating consequences of domestic violence. The case against Gotham is still unfolding, but it's a stark reminder of the dangers that can lurk in the most intimate relationships.
As...

item.title: 'I'm a killer': Man charged with murder after punching — True Crime Digest | Jul 15
item.description: Forty-eight hours is all it took for a single punch to turn into a murder charge, as a man who struck his victim, causing him to fall down a set of patio stairs and hit his head on the pavement, is now facing the very real possibility of spending the rest of his life behind bars. The incident, which seemed like a tragic accident at first, took a dark turn when the victim succumbed to his injuries days later in the hospital. Witnesses told law enforcement that the altercation ended with the victi...
